front: Photograph: near-abstract image of the Rhine River — two bands of green grass separated by the gray-green river under a gray sky; factories digitally removed from the horizon; sold for $4.3 million (most expensive photograph ever sold)
Photograph: shows neatly organized rows of brightly colored products in a California discount supermarket; the title word appears on the wall next to 'thanks,' 'only,' and 'nothing over'
Photograph: shows thousands of matching cheerleaders with paneled depictions of flowers and doves behind them, taken at the Arirang Festival in Pyongyang
Photograph: shows the Super-Kamiokande neutrino observatory as golden spheres (phototubes) reflected in water, with two small humans on boats
work: Stock Exchange Series and Other Works

front: Photograph: shows the Sakhir Formula One racetrack in Bahrain as a black asphalt tangle against a desert landscape
work: Stock Exchange Series and Other Works

front: Artist: student of Bernd and Hilla Becher; associated with the Düsseldorf School; known for large-format, digitally edited photographs taken from high vantage points
